'''ranudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avercorn|avercorn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avercorn|avercorn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ranudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænidhith|rænidhith]] || [[word:rænidhij|rænidhij]] || [[word:rænidhish|rænidhish]] || [[word:rænidhi|rænidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranunudhuth|ranunudhuth]] || [[word:ranunudhuj|ranunudhuj]] || [[word:ranunudhush|ranunudhush]] || [[word:ranunudhu|ranunudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranudhuth|ranudhuth]] || [[word:ranudhuj|ranudhuj]] || [[word:ranudhush|ranudhush]] || [[word:ranudhu|ranudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranufdhuth|ranufdhuth]] || [[word:ranufdhuj|ranufdhuj]] || [[word:ranufdhush|ranufdhush]] || [[word:ranufdhuf|ranufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranudhuthu|ranudhuthu]] || [[word:ranudhuju|ranudhuju]] || [[word:ranudhushu|ranudhushu]] || [[word:ranudhuku|ranudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranudhuth|ranudhuth]] || [[word:ranudhuj|ranudhuj]] || [[word:ranudhush|ranudhush]] || [[word:ranudhu|ranudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranudhuthul|ranudhuthul]] || [[word:ranudhujul|ranudhujul]] || [[word:ranudhushul|ranudhushul]] || [[word:ranudhukul|ranudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranudhuthuthu|ranudhuthuthu]] || [[word:ranudhujuju|ranudhujuju]] || [[word:ranudhushushu|ranudhushushu]] || [[word:ranudhuku|ranudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranudhuthun|ranudhuthun]] || [[word:ranudhujun|ranudhujun]] || [[word:ranudhushun|ranudhushun]] || [[word:ranudhukun|ranudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranudhuthuoro|ranudhuthuoro]] || [[word:ranudhujuoro|ranudhujuoro]] || [[word:ranudhushuoro|ranudhushuoro]] || [[word:ranudhukuoro|ranudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
